name: Index a URL then search it
query: Add https://example.com/clips/derby.mp4 to my library and find the penalty
expected_behavior: Calls upload_video_from_url with the URL and a unique_id
Ensures indexing reached PARSE — either via wait_for_indexing or by polling get_video_metadata
Does not search before status is PARSE
Calls search_videos with the SAME unique_id used at upload
Summarizes the found moment with videoNo + timestamp
success_criteria: search_videos uses the same unique_id as the upload
Agent waits for / confirms PARSE before searching
Reports the videoNo and the matching start/end time
Surfaces FAIL or a still-indexing state honestly rather than claiming a false result
